case_title: PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA VS. PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION $5,810.00 U.S. ET AL

docket_entries.description: PETITION FOR FORFEITURE FILED BY PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA AS TO RESPONDENT PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION $5,810.00 U.S. CURRENCY 81,136.00 U.S. CURRENCY DOES 1 TO 100, INCLUSIVE JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
NOTICE OF SEIZURE AND NOTICE OF INITIATION OF JUDICIAL FORFEITURE PROCEEDINGS (H&S 11488.4(A), 11488.5(A)(1)) INTERESTED PARTY : TOMIKA BELL FILED BY PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA
NOTICE OF SEIZURE AND NOTICE OF INITIATION OF JUDICIAL FORFEITURE PROCEEDINGS (H&S 11488.4(A), 11488.5(A)(1)) INTERESTED PARTY : FRANKLIN ERVIN FILED BY PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA
DECLARATION OF SERVICE VIA CERTIFIED MAIL ON INTERESTED PARTY TOMIKA BELL (19-090) (TRANSACTION ID # 65676456) FILED BY PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: JUDGMENT OF FORFEITURE AND DISPOSITION PURSUANT TO STIPULATION. RESPONDENT PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION: $30,000.00 BE RELEASED TO ATTORNEY JOSEPH D. O'SULLIVAN ON BEHALF OF CLAIMANT FRANKLIN ERVIN. RESPONDENT PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION: $56,946.00 PLUS INTEREST SINCE DATE OF DEPOSIT IS HEREBY DECLARED FORFEITED PURSUANT TO H&S 11470 ET SEQ AND DISPOSED OF AS PROVIDED BY H&S 11489. ANY RIGHTS TO APPEAL OR FURTHER LITIGATION CONCERNING THE SEIZURE OR RESOLUTION OF THIS FORFEITURE IS MUTUALLY WAIVED BY BOTH PARTIES. ANY STIPULATIONS WHICH STAYED THIS FORFEITURE PROCEEDING IS RELEASED. CLAIMANT WAIVES HIS/HER RIGHT TO HAVE SAME JUDGE OR JURY DECIDE BOTH THE CRIMINAL AND FORFEITURE CASE. CLAIMANT WAIVES CONDITION PRECEDENT TO THIS FORFEITURE. PARTIES SHALL BEAR THEIR COSTS OF SUIT AND ATTORNEY FEES. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR FURTHER DETAILS. (206)

PROOF OF SERVICE OF PETITION FOR FORFEITURE IN REM; NOTICE OF SEIZURE AND NOTICE OF INITIATION OF JUDICIAL FORFEITURE PROCEEDINGS; JUDICIAL COUNCIL FORM MC200 CLAIM OPPOSING FORFEITURE (19-090) (TRANSACTION ID # 64332162) FILED BY PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA
